title: HTTP Caching, Freshness, Validators, Vary, and Invalidation · Go Client Systems · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An on-call reliability engineer tracing a production client incident must isolate a plausible but incorrect result from conflicting traces, repair its cause, and retain a regression witness for http caching, freshness, validators, vary, and invalidation, producing spec-aware cache decision notebook. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a Go 1.26 net/http spec-aware cache decision notebook and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through p…
objectives: Distinguish private, shared, gateway, browser, and application caches plus who may reuse stored responses. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Compute freshness from explicit directives, dates, age, and response context rather than wall-clock intuition. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Use ETag and Last-Modified validators with If-None-Match or If-Modified-Since and interpret 304 correctly. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Private Shared Cache
steps.instruction:
debug case — Go incident collection agent stores a response with max-age=50, ETag "rev-5", Age:5, and Vary: Accept-Language. A user-specific request arrives stale; compute reuse, revalidation, 304 metadata merge, cache key, and privacy policy. Competency probe: Distinguish private, shared, gateway, browser, and application caches plus who may reuse stored responses. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Inspect the Private Shared Cache trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Private Shared Cache.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for distinguish private, shared, gateway, browser, and application caches plus who may reuse stored responses. demonstrate the result through go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, roundtripper, and httptest evidence. For Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Private Shared Cache, keep Private Shared Cache connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.

For Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Private Shared Cache, challenge the documented misconception with request, response, fault, policy, and transfer evidence: Cache-Control private prevents every form of local response storage. This remains false for Go 1.26 net/http.
